ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the institution is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the institution is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the institution is located */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the institution */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution conducting the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the research station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the research station */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the research station is located */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution operating the research station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_stations_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "site_code" TEXT /* Code for the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the site is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitat_types" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat type */,
  "habitat_name" TEXT /* Name of the habitat type */,
  "habitat_description" TEXT /* Description of the habitat type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_quality" (
  "water_qual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water quality type */,
  "water_qual_name" TEXT /* Name of the water quality type */,
  "water_qual_description" TEXT /* Description of the water quality type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("water_qual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each point */,
  "transect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transect the point belongs to */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total number of points in the transect */,
  "point_num" INTEGER /* Number of the point within the transect */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification category */,
  "id_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification category */,
  "id_code" INTEGER /* Code for the classification category */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the classification category */,
  "major_category" TEXT /* Major category of the classification category */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the point */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the point */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "transect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transect the image belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* File name of the image */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the image */,
  "image_date" TEXT /* Date the image was taken */,
  "image_time" TEXT /* Time the image was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "transect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transect being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
